context: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower located on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It was constructed from 1887 to 1889 as the centerpiece of the 1889 World's Fair. The tower was designed by engineer Gustave Eiffel's company and initially received criticism from some prominent French artists and intellectuals. It later became a global cultural icon of France and one of the most recognizable structures in the world. Millions of visitors travel to the tower every year, making it one of the most visited paid monuments.
generated_question: For what event was the Eiffel Tower originally constructed?
